_comment_top: R6 Wave 7c — seed row for the KnowledgeRetrievalHandler 'GetKnowledgeSource' method. Replaces one of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on KnowledgeRetrievalTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'KnowledgeRetrievalHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'GetKnowledgeSource' to dispatch to the get-by-id pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (KNOWLEDGE-SOURCE-GET / KNOWLEDGE-BASE-SEARCH) share one handler class — same pattern as TextRefinementHandler (Wave 7 Q9). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_design: Capability gate: NOT set — KnowledgeRetrieval was always-available pre-Wave-7b and remains so. Leave sprk_requiredcapability null (default).
_comment_widget: This method emits a source_pane DocumentViewer widget via ToolResult.Metadata.widget (R6 Wave 7b adapter post-processing). The widget rendering is unchanged from the pre-R6 KnowledgeRetrievalTools.GetKnowledgeSourceAsync behavior.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Retrieve all indexed content for a specific knowledge source by its ID. Use when the user wants to see what is in a particular knowledge base or reference material. The knowledgeSourceId argument should be the GUID of a sprk_content record. Returns all chunks for the source and emits a source-pane DocumentViewer widget so the user can browse the knowledge source alongside the chat response.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-12 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: KnowledgeRetrievalHandler.GetKnowledgeSource Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the GetKnowledgeSource method. The 'knowledgeSourceId' identifies a specific sprk_content knowledge source whose chunks will be retrieved in full.

knowledgeSourceId.description: Knowledge source identifier (GUID of a sprk_content record) to retrieve. All indexed chunks for this source are returned.

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'GetKnowledgeSource' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the get-by-id method.
